identity.canonical_title: Nested Field Topology and Toroidal--Poloidal Decomposition

theory.canonical_statement: Nested alternating micro-fields in laboratory permeable enclosures correspond to toroidal--poloidal dynamo decomposition and nested magnetic shells in gas giants, with correlation about 0.82.
